topic: India's economic ties with Azerbaijan improve despite political drift

audio_script.text: Boom! India's investments in Azerbaijan just skyrocketed!
audio_script.speaker: narrator_male

audio_script.text: In 2025, Indian investments hit $56.047 million, up by a whopping 29.8 percent!
audio_script.speaker: narrator_male

audio_script.text: This is huge! It's boosting India's economic partnership with Azerbaijan, providing a solid investment platform.
audio_script.speaker: narrator_male

audio_script.text: Over the past decade, Indian investments in Azerbaijan have climbed substantially. Just imagine the possibilities!
audio_script.speaker: narrator_male

visual_script.prompt: Animation of a rocket representing the investment skyrocketing
A graph showing the rising trend of Indian investments in Azerbaijan
Images of flourishing businesses and industries due to the investments
Decade trend line graph showing the substantial climb of Indian investments in Azerbaijan
Call to action screen with 'Follow for more business news'
